title: Retrieval Index Schema V1
description: Schema for entries in the Project Lumina retrieval index. Each entry represents a retrievable artifact with its metadata, scope, and hash.

index_entry_id.description: Unique identifier for this index entry

artifact_id.description: Stable identifier for the artifact (e.g., domain pack ID, artifact ID)

content_hash.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the canonical artifact content. Must match the CTL CommitmentRecord hash.

ctl_commitment_record_id.description: ID of the CTL CommitmentRecord that committed this artifact's hash. Null for unverified drafts.

minimum_role.description: Minimum role required to retrieve this artifact

domain_restriction.description: If set, only sessions/actors in this domain may retrieve this artifact

session_restriction.description: If set, only the named session may retrieve this artifact

student_restriction.description: If set, only the named pseudonymous student may retrieve this artifact

semantic_embedding_available.description: Whether a semantic embedding is available for fuzzy retrieval of this artifact

summary.description: Short human-readable summary of the artifact's content (for reranking)

indexed_utc.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when this entry was indexed

deprecated.description: If true, this artifact is superseded and should not be used in new sessions

superseded_by.description: Index entry ID of the artifact that supersedes this one
